synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50064 Oracle Linux 9 osbuild bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50064
description:
[166-1.0.1]
- Bump to v166 to add support for anaconda ISO generation via image-builder [JIRA: OLDIS-50153]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50064

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50064.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
osbuild-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-luks2-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-lvm2-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-ostree-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-selinux-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-depsolve-dnf-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
python3-osbuild-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
osbuild-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-luks2-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-lvm2-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-ostree-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-selinux-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
osbuild-depsolve-dnf-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm
python3-osbuild-166-1.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/osbuild-166-1.0.1.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[166-1.0.1]
- Bump to v166 to add support for anaconda ISO generation via image-builder [JIRA: OLDIS-50153]
